name: chain_20k_mrr_to_191k_mrr_for_supplement_bra
method: $20k MRR to $191K MRR for supplement brand (I will not promote) heres every step of how we took a wellness brand from $20K MRR to $191K MRR in 7 months. It wasn’t all sunshine and rainbows but right n

stages.task: Scrape Meta Ad Library and TikTok Creative Center for DTC supplement/wellness brands running 20+ creatives/month with declining CTR or high frequency
Score brands by ad spend inefficiency signals (high creative volume + low engagement), filter to $10-50K MRR estimate based on product pricing and review volume, verify founder email/LinkedIn
Generate personalized AI audit: their current creative costs vs AI UGC pipeline (OpenClaw/Arcads), automated A/B testing savings, AI copywriting ROI projection
Cold email with PDF audit, subject line referencing their specific brand, LinkedIn DM follow-up day 3, track in CRM pipeline
